name: Kindergarten Languages & Culture — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences through a close look at songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences through a guided practice with songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences.

resources.title: ACTFL World-Readiness Standards
resources.description: Planning reference for this Kindergarten Languages & Culture pathway.

units.title: Wonder and notice: songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences through a close look at songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences.

activities.title: A close look at songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in songs, stories, everyday words, and honoring cultural differences.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
